prompts: A woman in her late 20s with bright red curly hair, freckled cheeks, and green eyes, wearing a yellow raincoat, stands at the end of a wooden dock by a misty lake, waving at the camera. Soft morning light, medium shot.

The wooden dock stretches out over the misty lake, now empty. Gentle ripples on the still water, distant pine trees fading into fog, a pair of ducks gliding across the surface. No people. Soft morning light, medium shot.

A woman in her late 20s with bright red curly hair, freckled cheeks, and green eyes, wearing a yellow raincoat, walks back along the wooden dock toward the camera from the far end, waving. The misty lake and pine trees are behind her. Soft morning light, medium shot.

A man in his 40s with a short black beard and warm brown eyes, wearing a navy peacoat and grey scarf, stands on a rain-slicked city sidewalk under a red umbrella, facing the camera. Yellow taxis and neon signs reflect on the wet pavement behind him. Evening light, medium shot.

A rain-slicked city sidewalk at night, empty under streetlights. Puddles reflect neon signs and passing yellow taxis. A red umbrella lies closed against a lamppost. No people in the foreground. Evening light, medium shot.

A man in his 40s with a short black beard and warm brown eyes, wearing a navy peacoat and grey scarf, walks back into view on the rain-slicked city sidewalk, picking up the red umbrella from the lamppost. Yellow taxis and neon signs reflect on the wet pavement. Evening light, medium shot.

A young woman in her early 20s with straight black hair in a high ponytail, wearing a bright orange hiking jacket and carrying a green backpack, stands on a mountain trail facing the camera. Snow-capped peaks and wildflower meadows stretch behind her. Golden hour light, medium shot.

A mountain trail winding through wildflower meadows with snow-capped peaks in the distance. The trail is empty, with only wildflowers swaying in the breeze and a marmot sitting on a rock. Golden hour light, medium shot.

A young woman in her early 20s with straight black hair in a high ponytail, wearing a bright orange hiking jacket and carrying a green backpack, appears on the mountain trail walking toward the camera from behind a bend. Snow-capped peaks and wildflower meadows behind her. Golden hour light, medium shot.

An elderly man in his 70s with thick white hair, round glasses, and a weathered face, wearing a beige linen shirt, sits at a wooden café table in a rustic Italian piazza facing the camera. A stone fountain with ivy behind him. Warm golden hour light, medium close-up.

A rustic Italian piazza with an empty wooden café table in the foreground. The stone fountain splashes gently, ivy hangs from old walls, pigeons peck at cobblestones, and a waiter wipes a nearby table. No one sits at the foreground table. Warm golden hour light, medium shot.

An elderly man in his 70s with thick white hair, round glasses, and a weathered face, wearing a beige linen shirt, returns to the wooden café table in the rustic Italian piazza, sitting down and facing the camera with a warm smile. The stone fountain with ivy behind him. Warm golden hour light, medium close-up.

A young boy around 10 years old with messy brown hair and a gap-toothed grin, wearing a red-and-white striped shirt, rides a blue bicycle along a tree-lined suburban street toward the camera. Dappled sunlight through the leaves. Afternoon light, medium shot.

A quiet tree-lined suburban street with no one on it. Dappled sunlight filters through maple leaves onto the empty sidewalk. A parked blue bicycle leans against a white picket fence. Birds chirp. Afternoon light, medium shot.

A young boy around 10 years old with messy brown hair and a gap-toothed grin, wearing a red-and-white striped shirt, runs back to the blue bicycle leaning against the fence on the tree-lined suburban street, hops on, and rides toward the camera. Dappled afternoon sunlight, medium shot.

A woman in her 30s with shoulder-length auburn hair and bright blue eyes, wearing a white sundress and straw hat, stands in a sunflower field facing the camera with a gentle smile. Tall sunflowers surround her under a clear blue sky. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A vast sunflower field under a clear blue sky. Tall sunflowers sway gently in the breeze, bees move between blooms, and a straw hat rests on top of one sunflower. No person visible. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A woman in her 30s with shoulder-length auburn hair and bright blue eyes, wearing a white sundress, emerges from among the tall sunflowers walking toward the camera, reaching for the straw hat resting on a sunflower. Clear blue sky. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.
